'''Anjet Okeco''' was a [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] reporter for the [[Jrade District/Legends|Jrade District]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he wrote an article about the use of [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]] among [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] youths, which included an interview with a fifteen-year-old drug abuser known as [[Pori Nate]].

{{Char-stub}}
